game_meta.name: Valorant
game_meta.tagline: 5v5 tactical FPS with hero abilities — bomb objective, ability-based playmaking, no respawn.

sides.attack: Attackers — plant the Spike (bomb) on A, B, or C site
sides.defense: Defenders — prevent the plant or defuse the Spike

game_meta.character_vocab: agents (Riot's term — agents have unique abilities, unlike CS2)
game_meta.round_economy: Pistol → Eco / Half-buy / Full buy. Credits cap at 9000. Save weapons across rounds.
game_meta.round_format: MR12 — first to 13 rounds wins. Halftime side swap. Overtime sudden death if 12-12.
key_mechanics: Each agent has 4 abilities: Signature (free per round), 2 buyable (C and Q), and Ultimate (6-7 charges to use)
Ultimates are round-changing — track enemy ult points every round
Spike plant: 4-second animation, 45-second timer. Defuse: 7s full, 3.5s half (carrot)
Signature ability recharges per round — use it or lose it
First bullet accuracy: stand still for ~0.3s for accurate first shot
Headshot multiplier: 4x for most weapons (Vandal/Phantom 1-tap headshot at any range)
Agent roles: Duelist (entry), Initiator (info/flash), Controller (smokes), Sentinel (lockdown)

bind.name: Bind

sites.name: A Site (Bath / Truck)
common_attack_executes: Default A: Controller smoke Heaven + Lamps, Duelist entry through Showers, Sentinel watches Lamps for flank
Bath teleporter execute: Initiator flash Bath, Duelist enters first, full team execute through Bath
Showers split: 3 Showers + 2 U-Hall split timing with smokes covering Heaven
common_defense_setups: Default: 1 Heaven + 1 Showers + 1 mid + 2 B (Hookah, site)
Aggressive U-Hall: 2 defenders push U-Hall early for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold from Heaven, Lamps, and Truck with smoke covering Showers retake.

sites.name: B Site (Hookah / Long)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Window + Default, push Long with 4 + 1 Hookah
Hookah teleporter execute: full team teleport through Hookah, fast plant
Long execute: smoke Window + Truck, push Long with 4 + 1 mid
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Hookah: 2 defenders push Hookah early for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Back Site: hold from Window, Garden, and Hookah with smoke covering Default retake.

bind.mid_control: Bind has no traditional mid — replaced by two teleporters (Hookah and Bath). Teleporter control is the macro game.
bind.unique_mechanic: Teleporters (Bath and Hookah) allow fast rotates. Audio cue on teleporter use — enemy hears.

haven.name: Haven

sites.name: A Site (Heaven / Default)
common_attack_executes: Default A: Controller smoke Heaven + Sewer, Duelist entry Short, full team execute
Long A: smoke Heaven, push Long with 4, plant Default
A-Lobby split: 3 A + 2 mid for split timing
common_defense_setups: Default: 1 Heaven + 1 Short + 1 mid + 1 B + 1 C
Aggressive Long: 2 defenders push Long early
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Long + Short with smoke covering retake.

sites.name: B Site (Mid)
common_attack_executes: Mid default: smoke Window + Garage, push from mid with 4 + 1 A info
B Long execute: smoke Garage + Heaven, push B Long with 4
Mid contest: aggressive Window with Duelist for early pick
common_defense_setups: Aggressive mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold from Window, Garage, and Doors with smoke covering Mid retake.

sites.name: C Site (Long / Lobby)
common_attack_executes: Default C: smoke C-Long + Garage, push C-Lobby with 4
C-Long execute: smoke Garage + Default, push Long with 4 + 1 mid
Mid + C split: 3 C + 2 mid for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive C-Long: 2 defenders push C-Long early
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold C-Long + Garage + Cubby with smoke covering Lobby retake.

haven.mid_control: Haven has wide mid with multiple entries. Mid serves as A and C rotation lane.
haven.unique_mechanic: Three bomb sites instead of two — defenders must spread thinner. Rotations are longer.

split.name: Split

sites.name: A Site (Heaven / Tower)
common_attack_executes: Heaven take: smoke Hell + Site, push Heaven with 4
Default A: smoke Heaven + Tower, push Ramps with 4
A Main + Heaven split: 3 A Main + 2 Heaven for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Ramps: 2 defenders push Ramps for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Site: hold Heaven + Ramps + Screens with smoke covering retake.

sites.name: B Site (Tower / Back)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Tower + Sewers, push B Main with 4
Tower take: smoke Site + Back, push Tower with 4 for vertical advantage
Sewers execute: smoke Mid + Tower, push Sewers with 4
common_defense_setups: Aggressive mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Back: hold from Tower, Sewers, and Default with smoke covering Mid retake.

split.mid_control: Split mid is tight chokes with Sewers and Vents flank options. Mid control gives both sites' rotations.
split.unique_mechanic: Vertical layout — Heaven (A) and Tower (B) give significant high-ground advantage.

ascent.name: Ascent

sites.name: A Site (Generator / Tree)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Catwalk, push A Main with 4
Catwalk take: aggressive Catwalk for early picks
A Main + Heaven split: 3 A Main + 2 Tree for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Catwalk: 2 defenders push Catwalk early
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Tree + Catwalk with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Stairs / Logs)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Market + Switch, push B Main with 4
Mid Switch take: control mid, push B with 5 from Switch
B Main + Market split: 3 B Main + 2 Market for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Switch: 2 defenders push Switch for mid info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Stairs + Switch + Logs with smoke covering B Main retake.

ascent.mid_control: Ascent mid (Switch + Tube) is the iconic Val mid. Switch doors are the only doors in Val — block sightlines temporarily.
ascent.unique_mechanic: Doors on Switch can be shot open or closed — temporary mid blockers.

icebox.name: Icebox

sites.name: A Site (Belt / Pipes)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Rafters + Screens, push A Main with 4
Belt take: aggressive Belt rope for early pick
A Main + Nest split: 3 A Main + 2 Nest for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Belt: 2 defenders push Belt for early info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Site: hold Belt + Rafters + Pipes with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Yellow / Green)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Yellow + Snowman, push B Main with 4
Mid Boiler take: control mid via Boiler, push B with 5
B Main + Snowman split: 3 B Main + 2 Snowman for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Boiler: 2 defenders push Boiler for mid info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Back Site: hold Yellow + Green + Snowman with smoke covering B Main retake.

icebox.mid_control: Icebox mid is layered with Boiler and Mid Top. Control is critical for rotation reads.
icebox.unique_mechanic: Vertical map — ropes and rafters create unique high-ground angles. Wall hugging matters.

breeze.name: Breeze

sites.name: A Site (Default / Cave)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Cave, push A Main with 4
Heaven take: smoke Cave + Site, push Heaven for vertical advantage
A Main + Bridge split: 3 A Main + 2 Bridge for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive A Main: 2 defenders push A Main for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Cave + Cubby with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Tunnel / Hall)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Elbow + Pyramid, push B Main with 4
Mid + B split: control mid, push B from mid with 5
B Tunnel rush: rush Tunnel with one flash — works on eco defenders
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Back: hold Pyramid + Elbow + Tunnel with smoke covering retake.

breeze.mid_control: Breeze mid is the iconic long sightline — Operator/AWP territory. Mid control is round-defining.
breeze.unique_mechanic: Long sightlines — Operator (sniper) is meta-defining on this map.

lotus.name: Lotus

sites.name: A Site (Hut / Drop)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Hut, push A Main with 4
Drop execute: drop through Drop with smokes on Heaven, fast plant
A Main + Tree split: 3 A Main + 2 Tree for split timing
common_defense_setups: Default: 1 Heaven + 1 Site + 1 mid + 1 B + 1 C
Aggressive Tree: 2 defenders push Tree for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Tree + Drop with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Main / Hut)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Window + Pillar, push B Main with 4
Mid Doors execute: control mid doors, push B with 5 from mid
B + C split: split timing between B and C bombsite
common_defense_setups: Aggressive mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Back: hold Hut + Window + Pillar with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: C Site (Waterfall / Hall)
common_attack_executes: Default C: smoke Heaven + Hall, push C Main with 4
Waterfall take: control Waterfall, push C with 5 from above
Mid Doors + C split: control mid + push C from both sides
common_defense_setups: Aggressive C-Main: 2 defenders push C-Main for early info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold Heaven + Waterfall + Hall with smoke covering Main retake.

lotus.mid_control: Lotus has rotating Mid Doors (Sage-style walls block doors). Mid control with door management is key.
lotus.unique_mechanic: Three sites + Rotating Doors (Mid + B). Doors can be shot open/closed for sightline management.

sunset.name: Sunset

sites.name: A Site (Default / Elbow)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Elbow, push A Main with 4
Mid take: control mid Top, push A from mid + Main split
A Main + Tree split: 3 A Main + 2 Tree for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Elbow: 2 defenders push Elbow for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Tree + Elbow with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Mall / Market)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Long + Market, push B Main with 4
Mid Top + B split: control mid, push B from mid with 5
Market execute: smoke Long + Back, push Market with 4
common_defense_setups: Aggressive mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold Long + Market + Back with smoke covering retake.

sunset.mid_control: Sunset mid is critical — Mid Top is the rotation lane between both sites.
sunset.unique_mechanic: Urban environment, long sightlines on B Long, tight corners on A. Operator viable.

abyss.name: Abyss

sites.name: A Site (Heaven / Default)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Pit, push A Main with 4 — careful of fall damage zones
Heaven take: smoke Default + Drop, push Heaven for vertical advantage
Drop play: drop on enemy from Heaven for surprise plays
common_defense_setups: Aggressive A Main: 2 defenders push A Main for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Drop + Pit with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Plat / Default)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Plat + Heaven, push B Main with 4 — careful of fall zones
Plat take: control Plat, push B from Plat with 5
Mid + B split: control mid, push B from mid with 5
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Plat + Heaven + Cubby with smoke covering Main retake.

abyss.mid_control: Abyss mid has long sightlines and fall zones. Mid control with smoke management is critical.
abyss.unique_mechanic: Open-sided map — falling off the edge is instant death. Pushing must avoid fall zones.

corrode.name: Corrode

sites.name: A Site (Heaven / Default)
common_attack_executes: Default A: smoke Heaven + Connector, push A Main with 4
Drop execute: drop on enemy from Heaven for vertical advantage
A Main + Connector split: 3 A Main + 2 Connector for split timing
common_defense_setups: Aggressive Connector: 2 defenders push Connector for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike Default: hold Heaven + Connector + Cubby with smoke covering Main retake.

sites.name: B Site (Main / Default)
common_attack_executes: Default B: smoke Heaven + Cubby, push B Main with 4
Mid + B split: control mid, push B from mid with 5
Heaven take: smoke Site + Cubby, push Heaven for vertical advantage
common_defense_setups: Aggressive mid: 2 defenders contest mid for info
sites.post_plant_positions: Spike at Default: hold Heaven + Cubby + Site with smoke covering Main retake.

corrode.mid_control: Corrode mid is the rotation lane. Mid control is critical for site reads.
corrode.unique_mechanic: Industrial chemical plant aesthetic with verticality and corner-heavy layouts.

kit.signature: Tailwind (dash) — instant horizontal dash, recharges on 2 kills
kit.q: Updraft (jump) — vertical boost for high-angle peeks
kit.ult: Blade Storm — 5 throwing knives, headshot 1-shot, reset on kill

common_mistakes: Dashing into multiple enemies without team backup
Using ult mid-fight instead of pre-fight (no flash bind)
Updraft for awkward angles (telegraphs the play)
Saving dash on save round (use it for survival)
No utility coordination — solo entries
Jett.ideal_use: Entry first onto site using dash + smoke for self-cover. Updraft for off-angle peeks. Blade Storm for round-changing eco kills.

kit.signature: Devour (orb consume for HP) / Dismiss (orb consume for invuln)
kit.c: Leer (eye flash) — directional flash with line of sight check
kit.ult: Empress — speed boost + auto-Dismiss on kill

common_mistakes: Leering own teammates
Not consuming orbs before next fight
Using Dismiss reactively (after taking damage) instead of pre-fight
Solo flashing without team trade behind
Ult on save round (overcommit)
Reyna.ideal_use: Pop Leer through smoke for site execute. Consume orb for HP after engagement. Empress on critical retakes.

kit.signature: Hot Hands (molly) — heal molly that damages enemies
kit.c: Blaze (wall) — fire wall blocks vision + damages
kit.ult: Run It Back — Phoenix dies, respawns at cast location

common_mistakes: Wall blocking own teammates
Flash exposure when teammate isn't in trade position
Run It Back ult into 5 enemies (suicide ult)
Hot Hands on full HP (waste)
Curveball thrown without line of sight check
Phoenix.ideal_use: Blaze wall to block sightline. Curveball flash for entry. Run It Back for late-round scouting.

kit.ult: Showstopper — rocket launcher, 1-shot kill in radius

common_mistakes: Satchel jumps into 5 enemies
Paint Shells into own teammates
Showstopper without line of sight (wasted shot)
Boom Bot in obvious paths (gets shot)
Solo satchel without team utility
Raze.ideal_use: Satchel for vertical entries. Boom Bot for info. Paint Shells on common holds. Showstopper round-changers.

kit.signature: Recon Bolt — wallhack arrow, reveals enemies in cone
kit.c: Owl Drone — controllable scout drone with tag
kit.ult: Hunter's Fury — 3 wall-piercing arrows for damage + reveal

common_mistakes: Recon Bolt in random spots (no setup)
Owl Drone exposed without team coverage
Shock Bolt lineups not learned per map
Hunter's Fury without info (missed all 3 arrows)
No utility coordination — Recon used at wrong timing
Sova.ideal_use: Recon Bolt before site execute. Owl Drone for site info. Shock Bolt lineups for damage. Hunter's Fury on post-plant retake.

kit.ult: Rolling Thunder — large area stun + damage

common_mistakes: Flashing own teammates
Fault Line through random walls (no info on enemy positions)
Aftershock without follow-up commit
Rolling Thunder on eco round (wasted)
Solo entries — Breach needs team commit
Breach.ideal_use: Stun + flash chain through walls for entry. Aftershock on hold positions. Rolling Thunder on full team executes.

kit.signature: Guiding Light (bird flash) — flash bird with line of sight check

common_mistakes: Flashing teammates with Guiding Light
Regrowth at wrong moment (during fight = wasted)
Trailblazer killed without info gained
Seekers not following enemy spawn rotation
No coordination on flash bind with Duelist
Skye.ideal_use: Guiding Light bind with Duelist for entries. Regrowth post-fight. Trailblazer for site info. Seekers for round-closing pressure.

common_mistakes: Zero/Point thrown without info (random suppression)
Flash/Drive without team trade behind
Ult on eco round (wasted)
Frag/Ment thrown into walls (no info)
No coordination on suppression timing
KAY/O.ideal_use: Zero/Point on enemy ult agent (block ult). Flash/Drive for entry. Null/Cmd on critical retake to disable team.

kit.ult: From the Shadows — global teleport (visible to enemy)

common_mistakes: Paranoia through smoke (no LOS check)
Shrouded Step into known angles (gets pre-aimed)
Smoke timing wrong — too early (fade before execute) or too late
Ult into stack (instant death)
Wasting smoke recharges (always have one ready)
Omen.ideal_use: Dark Cover smoke on execute. Paranoia for entry. Shrouded Step for off-angle. Ult for round 1v3+ scouting.

kit.signature: Sky Smoke (smoke) — 3 placeable smokes from map view
kit.c: Stim Beacon — team fire rate buff

common_mistakes: Smoke placement wrong from map view (off-target)
Stim Beacon used solo (no team to buff)
Incendiary on empty spots (no enemy in zone)
Orbital Strike not synced with team retake commit
Wasting all 3 smokes early — no late-round smoke
Brimstone.ideal_use: Sky Smoke on execute. Incendiary on plant deny. Orbital Strike on post-plant retake.

kit.signature: Stars (5 stars) — placeable smoke/concuss/gravity from map view
kit.abilities: Each Star activates as Smoke / Concuss (concussion) / Gravity (vacuum)
kit.ult: Cosmic Divide — long wall blocking sightline + bullets

common_mistakes: Star placement on wrong locations (slow rotation back)
Smoke / Concuss / Gravity activation timing off
Cosmic Divide for split execute (not used for round-changing)
Wasting Concuss on empty cubby
Gravity in open area (no kill follow-up)
Astra.ideal_use: Smoke stars on execute. Concuss for entry. Gravity for plant deny. Cosmic Divide for retake split.

kit.signature: Toxic Screen — placeable line of fuel-based wall
kit.ult: Viper's Pit — large toxic zone, decay enemies inside

common_mistakes: Toxic Screen + Poison Cloud at same time = no fuel for late round
Snake Bite without commit
Pit too early — no retake setup
Pit obvious — enemy stays out
Not breaking enemy decay with HP buffer
Viper.ideal_use: Toxic Screen on execute wall. Poison Cloud for plant deny. Pit on post-plant retake hold.

kit.signature: High Tide (wall) — water wall blocks vision + slow
kit.c: Cove (smoke dome) — water dome blocks vision + bullets briefly
kit.q: Cascade (line wall) — water line wall slows

common_mistakes: Wall placement wrong (no entry coverage)
Cove dome dropped early (no enemy timing)
Cascade thrown into walls
Reckoning on eco (wasted)
No coordination with Duelist on entry timing
Harbor.ideal_use: High Tide wall for execute. Cove for entry cover. Cascade for plant deny. Reckoning on critical retake.

kit.ult: Neural Theft — reveal enemy positions after kill

common_mistakes: Trapwire in obvious spots (enemy spams)
Spycam in known cam spots (enemy shoots)
Cyber Cage on wrong angle (no use)
Neural Theft on dead body in nowhere
No coordination on flank watch
Cypher.ideal_use: Trapwire on flank routes. Spycam in unconventional spots. Cyber Cage on execute hold. Neural Theft for round-closing intel.

common_mistakes: Turret in obvious spots (gets destroyed)
Nanoswarm not synced with plant
Alarmbot in main entries (gets destroyed)
Lockdown without team retake (no win condition)
Solo lurk far from utility
Killjoy.ideal_use: Turret on site for flank info. Nanoswarm on plant deny. Alarmbot on cubby. Lockdown on post-plant retake.

common_mistakes: Healing self instead of teammate (Heal is wasted)
Wall in own teammates' line of fire
Slow Orb on empty cubby (no enemy)
Resurrection on rifle teammate (no eco difference)
Solo lurk far from heal range
Sage.ideal_use: Wall for execute + plant deny. Slow Orb on entry. Resurrection on key teammate.

kit.c: Headhunter — extra pistol with op-grade headshot damage

common_mistakes: Trademark in obvious spots
Headhunter without commit
Rendezvous anchors placed in known spots
Tour de Force used on standard angles
Solo Chamber pick without team utility
Chamber.ideal_use: Trademark for flank watch. Rendezvous for off-angle. Tour de Force on critical 1v1.

kit.c: Sonic Sensor — area concuss on enemy footstep

common_mistakes: GravNet in random spots
Sonic Sensor placed on common entries (enemy detects)
Barrier Mesh on wrong angle (no use)
Annihilation on wrong target
Solo Deadlock with no team coverage
Deadlock.ideal_use: GravNet for entry. Sensor on flank. Barrier on plant deny. Annihilation on key target.

iron: Not using signature ability every round (forgets it exists)
Buying random weapons (Vandal vs Phantom — no preference)
Standing still while shooting (good — correct mechanic)
Spraying at any range (rifle = burst at 20m+)
Walking around the map (sprint instead = enemy hears)
No crosshair placement — looking at floor
Ignoring ult tracking — no idea who has ult
Wasting full save round buying flashbang only
No comms — full game in silence
bronze: Signature used but at wrong time (Tailwind for retreat = bad)
Pre-aim at head level only sometimes
No round economy thinking — buy rifle on eco
Saving rifle on lost rounds instead of dropping
Holding angles past first kill (enemy knows position)
Buying without team check — split economy
silver: Crosshair placement on map geometry, not enemy spawns
No retake utility on defender side
Aggressive Operator holds without escape plan
Defaults too aggressive — over-committed to one site
gold: Util execution timing on execute — smoke before flash
Operator picks on standard angles (no off-angle)
Half-buy spending — buying SMG without team plan
No anti-eco response on defender side
Bait teammate on retake — peeking after teammate dies
Round 1 pistol commit on every map (no economy thinking)
Crosshair placement on common angles — not adjusted
No comm on save round protection
platinum: Off-angle holds are obvious — enemy team has read them
Util execution timing — smoke fade timing wrong
Eco round commits — risk vs reward miscalculation
Operator rotates blocked by smoke timing
Late round info gathering — not adjusting
Buy decision based on round count, not economy
Trade kills missed by 1 second timing
Util coordination across team — overlapping waste
diamond: Pro-tier reads on enemy default — but predictable on own
Util discipline gaps — 1 wasted smoke per round
Mid-round comm overload — too many calls
Off-angle pre-aim — not adjusting per round
Lurker map info not relayed in time
Round economy: 1 credit shy on full buy
Operator positioning on retakes — caught out of position
ascendant_immortal: Ult tracking gaps — losing track of enemy ults
Util coordination across abilities — overlapping flashes/smokes
Economy gaps — wrong save / buy decisions
Comms overload — too many calls drowning info
Lurk timing — too early or too late
Plant position not optimized for hold

positioning: Is the player crosshair at head level pre-aimed on the angle?
Is the player standing in a common angle or off-angle?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines simultaneously?
Is the player in a trade position with teammate?
If Sentinel: is the player playing the lockdown site with util?
If Duelist: is the player entrying with team utility behind?
If Controller: is the player smoking the right angles for the execute?
If Initiator: is the player using sig before the entry, not during?
crosshair: Is the crosshair at head level?
Is the crosshair pre-aimed at the common angle?
Is the player standing still or moving before shooting? (Stand still = accurate)
Is the player tapping / bursting / spraying based on distance?
Is the player flicking onto target or tracking?
Is the player using Vandal (1-tap headshot) or Phantom (suppressed)?
utility: Did the player use signature ability this round?
Was a flash used before the player peeked?
Was a smoke used to block the angle the player crossed?
Was the utility coordinated with team or solo-thrown?
Did the player save signature for retake or use early?
Was ult tracked across the team (enemy ults known)?
Did the player use ult at the right round (not on eco)?
decisions: Did the player buy aligned with team economy?
Did the player commit to the site execute or hesitate?
Did the player rotate when called or stay on dead site?
Did the player save weapon on lost round?
Did the player trade teammate's death within 2s?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup (force loss)?
Did the player commit to flanking lurk or fold back?
Did the player use ult at the right time?
Did the player track enemy ult count before engaging?

vocabulary: Sig: Signature ability — free per round, recharges or one-use.
Ult / Ultimate: Special ability requiring 6-7 points to charge. Round-defining.
Ult econ / Ult tracking: Tracking enemy ult progress to know who has ult.
Lineup: Pre-determined throw angle for utility (Sova arrows, Brimstone mollys).
Pop flash: Quick flash that pops on the angle before enemy can turn away.
Bind flash: Flashing for a teammate's entry (Skye / Phoenix flash for Jett).
OP / Operator: Sniper rifle, 1-shot kill at any range.
Vandal: AK-equivalent, 1-tap headshot at any range, no falloff.
Phantom: M4-equivalent, suppressed, falloff at long range, 4 body shots = kill.
Half-buy / Force: Limited rifle/SMG buy on round 2 after loss.
Eco round: Full save with pistol + armor only.
Full buy: $4000+ team with rifles + utility + armor.
Pistol round: Round 1 and 13 with starting credits.
Spike: The bomb. Plant on A, B (or C on Haven/Lotus).
Plant: 4-second animation to plant Spike.
Defuse: 7-second to defuse, 3.5s half-defuse for carrot.
Carrot: Half-defuse where Spike has 0 timer left.
Lurk: Solo flanking play, no team support.
Anchor: Defender on a specific site, doesn't rotate.
Entry: Duelist taking first shot on site execute.
Trade: Killing the enemy who killed your teammate within 2-3s.
Crossfire: 2 teammates covering same angle for trade kills.
Off-angle: Position the enemy isn't expecting you to hold.
Common angle: Standard position 95% of players hold.
Pre-aim: Aiming crosshair at spot the enemy will appear.
Slice the pie: Peeking by stepping out slowly, exposing one angle at a time.
Flick: Fast crosshair adjustment for off-angle shot.
Tracking: Keeping crosshair on enemy as they move.
Burst: 3-4 round burst with rifle for mid-range.
Tap: Single shot for long-range accuracy.
Spray: Full-auto for close range.
First bullet accuracy: Stand still for 0.3s = accurate first shot.
Counter-strafe (Val): Release WASD before shooting for instant accuracy.
Stim Beacon: Brimstone fire-rate buff.
Smoke (Val): Persistent visual block, blocks bullets and sound partially.
Concuss: Daze enemy briefly (Breach, Astra).
Suppress: Block enemy abilities (KAY/O).
Detain: Lock enemy in place (Killjoy ult).
Resurrect: Revive dead teammate (Sage ult).
Dismiss / Devour: Reyna orb consume mechanic.
Tailwind: Jett dash ability.
Updraft: Jett vertical boost.
Empress: Jett ult — speed boost + auto-dismiss.
Run It Back: Phoenix ult — die + respawn at cast location.
Showstopper: Raze rocket launcher ult.
Hunter's Fury: Sova ult — 3 wall-piercing arrows.
Rolling Thunder: Breach ult — large area stun.
Seekers: Skye ult — 3 seeking enemies near-sight.
Null/Cmd: KAY/O ult — area suppression + reveal.
From the Shadows: Omen ult — global teleport.
Orbital Strike: Brimstone ult.
Cosmic Divide: Astra ult — long wall.
Viper's Pit: Viper ult — large toxic zone.
Reckoning: Harbor ult — large area concuss + damage.
Neural Theft: Cypher ult — reveal enemy positions.
Lockdown: Killjoy ult — area detain.
Resurrection: Sage ult — revive dead teammate.
Tour de Force: Chamber ult — single-shot sniper.
Annihilation: Deadlock ult — single-target track + kill.
